title: Mr R Jenks v Jenks UK Ltd (in voluntary liquidation) and The Secretary of State: 6008511/2025
text:
Case Number: 6008511/2025 
 
 
 
 
 
EMPLOYMENT TRIBUNALS 
 
 
Claimant: Mr R Jenks 
   
Respondent: Jenks UK Ltd (in voluntary liquidation) [1] 
The Secretary of State [2] 
   
Heard at: Cardiff via video On: 29 September 2025 
   
Before: Employment Judge G Duncan 
   
 
Representation:   
Claimant: No attendance 
Respondent: Mrs Whalley 
 
 
JUDGMENT 
 
 
Upon it being recorded that the Claimant failed to attend the hearing today. The 
Tribunal staff contacted the Claimant via telephone and he confirmed that he 
would not be attending and wanted to withdraw his claim. At 10:20am the 
Tribunal received email confirmation that he wanted to withdraw his claim 
 
1. The Claimant’s claims for a failure to pay a redundancy payment, failure 
by the Secretary of State to make an insolvency payment and failure to 
pay statutory annual leave are dismissed.  
 
 
________________________________ 
      Employment Judge G Duncan 
Dated:     29 September 2025                                                     
       
JUDGMENT SENT TO THE PARTIES ON 
 
      14 October 2025 
 
      Kacey O’Brien 
 
      FOR THE SECRETARY OF EMPLOYMENT TRIBUNAL
